hero.title: Tella Irani Shemirani
hero.subtitle: Architect
hero.tagline: Designing spaces that inspire, endure, and connect.

about.bio: Tella Irani Shemirani is a passionate architect dedicated to creating spaces that harmonize form, function, and human experience. With a keen eye for detail and a deep appreciation for cultural context, her work spans residential, commercial, and public architecture.
about.philosophy: Architecture is not just about buildings — it is about the lives lived within them. Every design decision is an opportunity to shape how people feel, move, and connect.

honors.title: John Adjaeleian Scholarship
honors.description: Awarded for the research, manufacturing, and prototyping of a robot representing an intelligent building skin — contributing to the understanding of building structures at the level of the building envelope.

contact.message: Let's create something extraordinary together. Reach out to discuss your project or collaboration.

showcase.title: Showcase
showcase.subtitle: A visual journey through selected architectural works.
